name: io.github.wmarceau/ticket-discovery
description: Search and compare concert ticket prices across platforms

environmentVariables.name: TICKETMASTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Ticketmaster Discovery API key (free at developer.ticketmaster.com)

environmentVariables.name: SEATGEEK_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: SeatGeek API client ID (free at seatgeek.com/account/develop)

environmentVariables.name: SEATGEEK_AFFILIATE_ID
environmentVariables.description: SeatGeek affiliate ID for commission tracking (optional)
